rag_rules: Fix unresolved references like 'Compute_Execution_Time' by deleting invalid AGREE clauses or rewriting them with visible identifiers.
Ensure type consistency in AGREE expressions: numeric variables must use numeric expressions, Boolean variables must use Boolean expressions.
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes; move valid assigns to implementation annexes.
Validate that all AGREE identifiers are visible in the current AADL scope and avoid introducing package-qualified names not in the model.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, only reference identifiers that are explicitly declared or visible in the current component scope.
Ensure all AGREE expressions maintain type consistency and avoid mismatched operand types.
Use only valid AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE annexes; do not assume property names are automatically available as variables.
If a diagnostic points to an invalid reference or type error, trace the root cause and either fix the reference or remove the clause.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks in appropriate component type or implementation scopes.
Constants and equations in AGREE must be declared with correct scalar types: int, real, bool.
Assignments in implementation scope must reference valid output features or declared auxiliary variables.
Helper functions and variables must be defined within the same AGREE annex or imported from valid packages.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to resolve missing identifiers by inventing new declarations; instead, remove or rewrite clauses using only visible identifiers.
Avoid placing implementation-level guarantees or assignments in component type annexes; they must be in implementation scopes.
Do not assume AADL property names (e.g., 'Compute_Execution_Time') are automatically available as AGREE variables.
Do not mix Boolean and numeric comparisons unless the data types are explicitly compatible and the requirement supports such usage.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE annex placement in component types vs. implementations
Model Analyst agent's role in extracting AADL structure
Requirement Analyst agent's role in traceability
Model Fusion agent's insertion location decisions
